task: Using only the embedded packet (three records and three remediation options plus max_budget), calculate derived metrics, classify each record for doublet overcall/undercall using provided thresholds, evaluate remediation options under the budget constraint, perform sensitivity checks, state smallest determining values, and produce a recommendation. Deliver a spreadsheet (single_cell_doublet_3.xlsx) with formulas and intermediate values and an expert memo (expert_memo.md) with row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity analysis, and final recommendation table. Mark ambiguous items as needs_review and do not invent inputs or impute missing values.
